src_raw: The HKMA official website (www.hkma.gov.hk) presents more than 40,000 pages of content in English and traditional and simplified Chinese, and is the public access gateway to up-to-date information about the HKMA. It also contains the register of authorized institutions (AIs) and local representative offices and the register of the securities staff of AIs, both maintained under section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, as well as the register of stored value facility (SVF) licensees under the payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance. The HKMA official website underwent a major revamp and was relaunched in September with a new design layout, enriched content, an enhanced navigation structure, and more convenient search functions. The revamped website enables users to search information more easily and conveniently based on their own preferences. In particular, the revamped website carries a new section on “Smart Consumers”, where the public can find useful information and smart tips on a wide range of banking and related products or services. This is in line with the HKMA’s long-standing efforts to promote “smart and responsible” use of banking services.
mt_raw: 金管局官方網站（www.hkma.gov.hk）提供超過40,000頁的英文、繁體中文及簡體中文內容，是公眾獲取金管局最新資訊的門戶。網站亦載有《銀行業條例》第20條規定的認可機構及本地代表辦事處名冊，以及認可機構證券業務員工名冊；還有《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》規定的儲值支付工具持牌人名冊。金管局官方網站在九月進行了重大改版及重新推出，採用了新的設計佈局、豐富了內容、強化了導覽結構，並提供了更便捷的搜尋功能。改版後的網站讓用戶可根據個人喜好，更輕易及便捷地搜尋資訊。改版後的網站特別增設了「智醒消費者」新專頁，讓公眾可找到有關各類銀行及相關產品或服務的實用資訊及智醒貼士。這與金管局長久以來推廣「智醒及負責任」使用銀行服務的努力一致。

src_raw: The HKMA Information Centre on the 55th floor of Two International Finance Centre is an important resource introducing the work of the HKMA to the community and promoting public awareness of monetary and banking matters. It consists of an exhibition area and a library, and is open to the public six days a week. The exhibition area describes the HKMA’s work and the development of money and banking in Hong Kong. It also contains reading materials and exhibits for the study of Hong Kong’s monetary, banking and financial affairs.

src_raw: To reach out to the community and raise public awareness of the HKMA’s work, the HKMA organised a public education seminar for over 400 secondary school students and teachers in 2019. terms: {'hkma': '金管局', 'internet banking': '網上銀行', 'personal digital key': '個人數碼鎖匙'}
src_raw: The focus of the HKMA’s consumer education initiatives during the year was on educating the public to protect their “personal digital keys”, a concept introduced to help the public visualise the significance of safeguarding information for accessing their online accounts. The central message was that in the digital world, account login details and personal information related to internet banking and other digital financial services were as important as the keys to their home, and should be well protected. Extensive promotion was arranged across different media, including the TV, radio, mobile applications, social media, and other digital and out-of-home platforms, to highlight smart tips on how to protect personal digital keys.
mt_raw: 金管局在過去一年推出的消費者教育措施，重點是教育公眾保護其「個人數碼鎖匙」，這個概念旨在協助公眾了解保障網上帳戶登入資訊的重要性。核心信息是，在數碼世界中，與網上銀行及其他數碼金融服務相關的帳戶登入資料及個人資訊，與家居鎖匙一樣重要，應妥為保護。金管局透過不同媒體進行廣泛宣傳，包括電視、電台、流動應用程式、社交媒體及其他數碼及戶外平台，以推廣保護個人數碼鎖匙的智醒貼士。

src_raw: The Financial Secretary (FS) determines the pay and conditions of service for HKMA staff on the advice of the Governance Sub-Committee (GSC) through the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee (EFAC), taking into account the prevailing market rates and practices. mt_raw: 財政司司長根據管治委員會透過外匯基金諮詢委員會提出的建議，並考慮市場現行薪酬水平及慣例，釐定金管局員工的薪酬及服務條款。薪酬包括總現金酬金及公積金計劃，並附有少量實物福利。現金酬金包括每月固定薪金（或基本薪金）及浮動薪金，浮動薪金可按表現於每年年底以一筆過形式發放予個別員工。

terms: {'climate risk': '氣候風險', 'hkma': '金管局'}
src_raw: Climate change is one of the major risks threatening the well-being of mankind and the sustainability of the world economy. The financial sector in which banks operate, being an integral part of the society, will also be impacted and hence should be more proactive in managing climate risks. The HKMA is committed to exploring ways to address this challenge. Against this background, the HKMA unveiled in May a number of measures for promoting the development of green finance in Hong Kong, including the adoption of a three-phased approach to promote green and sustainable banking.

src_raw: The HKMA incorporates ESG factors into its investment analysis processes to identify risks and opportunities, as it believes that these factors can materially affect the long-term value of its investments. Specifically, the HKMA has been integrating ESG factors into its investment process for both public and private market investments. For public market investments, the HKMA incorporates ESG factors in its credit risk analysis of bond investment. External managers that share the HKMA’s RI beliefs are selected and appointed. The HKMA communicates its RI beliefs to all its external managers and expects them to align in such a way that the overall sustainable long-term economic performance target is attainable. For private market investments, the ESG policies and practices of the HKMA’s general partners are examined as part of its due diligence process.
mt_raw: 金管局將 ESG 因素納入其投資分析程序，以識別風險和機遇，因為它相信這些因素會對投資的長期價值產生重大影響。具體而言，金管局已將 ESG 因素納入其公共和私人市場投資的投資流程中。在公開市場投資方面，金管局在債券投資的信用風險分析中納入 ESG 因素。金管局挑選和委任了與金管局持有相同「負責任投資」信念的外聘投資經理。金管局向所有外聘投資經理傳達其「負責任投資」信念，並期望他們作出配合，以達致整體可持續的長期經濟表現目標。在私人市場投資方面，金管局一般合夥人的 ESG 政策和實務作為盡職審查程序的一部分受到檢視。

src_raw: To help the visually impaired differentiate between the denomination of the banknotes, a mobile app, sponsored by the HKMA and developed by the Hong Kong Society for the Blind, uses the phone’s camera to scan the banknote patterns for the denomination. The app is available for download from Apple App Store and Google play Store for free. A note-measuring template sponsored by the HKMA and the three note-issuing banks has also been introduced to measure the length of the note. It can measure both the 2018 Series and the notes currently in circulation. The template is embossed with Braille on one side and symbols on the other. It is freely distributed at voluntary agencies serving the visually impaired community.
mt_raw: 為協助視障人士分辨鈔票面額，由金管局贊助、香港盲人輔導會研發的行動應用程式，利用手機鏡頭掃描鈔票圖案以辨認面額。該程式可於 Apple App Store 及 Google Play Store 免費下載。金管局與三間發鈔銀行亦贊助推出量鈔器，以量度鈔票長度。它可量度 2018 鈔票系列及現時流通的鈔票。量鈔器一面印有點字，另一面印有符號。它於為視障人士服務的志願機構免費派發。

src_raw: To cater for projected operational needs, the HKMA renovated the offices during the year to create an open layout, increase capacity and allow for more efficient use of space. Breakout areas and ergonomic furniture are part of the new office design. src_raw: The HKMA promotes work-life balance and cares about the health and work safety of the staff. Regular talks on healthy lifestyles, stress management and workplace safety are organised and indoor air quality is monitored. Annual on-site medical check-ups and flu vaccinations are arranged. The HKMA also sponsors a professional counselling service comprising experienced psychologists and social workers.

src_raw: In my opinion, the financial statements give a true and fair view of the financial position of the Fund and of the Group as at 31 December 2019, and of their financial performance and cash flows for the year then ended in accordance with Hong Kong Financial Reporting Standards (“HKFRSs”) issued by the Hong Kong Institute of Certified Public Accountants (“HKICPA”) and have been properly prepared in accordance with the directive of the Chief Executive made under section 7 of the Exchange Fund Ordinance (Cap. 66).
mt_raw: 我認為，該財務報表根據香港會計師公會（「香港會計師公會」）頒布的《香港財務報告準則》（「香港財務報告準則」），真實而公允地反映了該基金及集團截至2019年12月31日的財務狀況，以及該年度的財務表現和現金流量，並已按照行政長官根據《外匯基金條例》（第66章）第7條發出的指示妥善編製。

src_raw: I conducted my audit in accordance with the directive of the Chief Executive made under section 7 of the Exchange Fund Ordinance and the Audit Commission auditing standards. My responsibilities under those standards are further described in the Auditor’s responsibilities for the audit of the financial statements section of my report. I am independent of the Group in accordance with those standards, and I have fulfilled my other ethical responsibilities in accordance with those standards. I believe that the audit evidence I have obtained is sufficient and appropriate to provide a basis for my opinion.
mt_raw: 我按照行政長官根據《外匯基金條例》第7條發出的指示及審計署的審計準則進行審計。我根據這些準則所承擔的責任，在我報告中的「審計師對財務報表審計的責任」一節中作了進一步說明。我根據這些準則獨立於集團之外，並已履行了根據這些準則所承擔的其他道德責任。我相信我所獲取的審計憑證是充分及適當的，為我發表意見提供了依據。

src_raw: The Group’s investment properties were stated at their fair values, totalling HK$22,481 million as at 31 December 2019. The Group also had interests in twenty two joint ventures totalling HK$44,506 million, whose principal activities were holding overseas investment properties. The fair values of these investment properties, whether held by the Group directly or by joint ventures, were mainly determined based on valuations by independent professional valuers. Such valuations involved significant judgments and estimates, including the valuation methodologies and the assumptions used.
mt_raw: 集團的投資物業按其公允價值列報，截至2019年12月31日總額為22,481百萬港元。集團亦持有二十二家合營公司的權益，總額為44,506百萬港元，其主要業務為持有海外投資物業。這些投資物業的公允價值，不論由集團直接持有或由合營公司持有，主要根據獨立專業估值師的估值而定。該等估值涉及重大判斷及估計，包括所用的估值方法及假設。

src_raw: The Monetary Authority is responsible for the preparation of the financial statements that give a true and fair view in accordance with HKFRSs issued by the HKICpA and the directive of the Chief Executive made under section 7 of the Exchange Fund Ordinance, and for such internal control as the Monetary Authority determines is necessary to enable the preparation of financial statements that are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error.
mt_raw: 金融管理專員負責按照香港會計師公會頒布的《香港財務報告準則》及行政長官根據《外匯基金條例》第7條發出的指示，編製真實而公允的財務報表，並負責金融管理專員認為必要的內部控制，以使編製的財務報表不存在因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大誤報。

mt_raw: 在編製財務報表時，金融管理專員負責評估集團的持續經營能力，酌情披露與持續經營有關的事項，並採用持續經營的會計基礎。

terms: {'audit commission': '審計署', 'audit commission auditing standard': '審計署的審計準則', "auditor 's report": '審計師報告', 'financial statement': '財務報表', 'material misstatement': '重大錯誤陳述'}
src_raw: My objectives are to obtain reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes my opinion. Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance, but is not a guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with the Audit Commission auditing standards will always detect a material misstatement when it exists. Misstatements can arise from fraud or error and are considered material if, individually or in the aggregate, they could reasonably be expected to influence the economic decisions of users taken on the basis of these financial statements.
mt_raw: 我的目標是取得合理保證，以確定財務報表整體是否不存在因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大誤報，並發表包含我意見的審計師報告。合理保證是高水平的保證，但並不能保證按照審計署的審計準則進行的審計能夠在存在重大誤報時總能發現該誤報。誤報可能因欺詐或錯誤而產生，如果其個別或合計起來可能影響用戶依據這些財務報表作出的經濟決策，則被認為是重大的。

src_raw: - identify and assess the risks of material misstatement of the financial statements, whether due to fraud or error, design and perform audit procedures responsive to those risks, and obtain audit evidence that is sufficient and appropriate to provide a basis for my opinion. The risk of not detecting a material misstatement resulting from fraud is higher than for one resulting from error, as fraud may involve collusion, forgery, intentional omissions, misrepresentations, or the override of internal control;
mt_raw: - 識別及評估財務報表因欺詐或錯誤而出現重大誤報的風險，設計及執行審計程序以應對這些風險，並取得充分及適當的審計憑證，作為我發表意見的依據。因欺詐而未發現重大誤報的風險高於因錯誤而未發現重大誤報的風險，因為欺詐可能涉及串通、偽造、故意遺漏、虛假陳述或凌駕於內部控制之上；

mt_raw: - 評估金融管理專員所採用的會計政策的適當性、會計估計的合理性及相關披露情況；

src_raw: - conclude on the appropriateness of the Monetary Authority’s use of the going concern basis of accounting and, based on the audit evidence obtained, whether a material uncertainty exists related to events or conditions that may cast significant doubt on the Group’s ability to continue as a going concern. If I conclude that a material uncertainty exists, I am required to draw attention in my auditor’s report to the related disclosures in the financial statements or, if such disclosures are inadequate, to modify my opinion. My conclusions are based on the audit evidence obtained up to the date of my auditor’s report. However, future events or conditions may cause the Group to cease to continue as a going concern;
mt_raw: - 就金融管理專員使用持續經營會計基礎的適當性作出結論，並根據所獲取的審計憑證，確定是否存在與可能對集團持續經營能力產生重大疑慮的事件或情況有關的重大不確定性。如果我得出結論認為存在重大不確定性，我有責任在審計師報告中提請注意財務報表中的相關披露，或如果披露不充分，則修改我的意見。我的結論是基於截至我發表審計師報告之日所獲取的審計憑證。然而，未來的事件或情況可能導致集團無法持續經營；

terms: {'exchange fund': '外匯基金', 'exchange fund advisory committee': '外匯基金諮詢委員會', "auditor 's report": '審計師報告', 'financial statement': '財務報表', 'key audit matter': '關鍵審計事項'}
src_raw: From the matters communicated with the Audit Sub-Committee of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, I determine those matters that were of most significance in the audit of the financial statements of the current period and are therefore the key audit matters. I describe these matters in my auditor’s report unless law or regulation precludes public disclosure about the matter or when, in extremely rare circumstances, I determine that a matter should not be communicated in my report because the adverse consequences of doing so would reasonably be expected to outweigh the public interest benefits of such communication.
mt_raw: 從與外匯基金諮詢委員會審核小組委員會溝通的事項中，我確定了在本期財務報表審計中最為重要的事項，因此這些事項是關鍵審計事項。除非法律或法規禁止公開披露該事項，或在極為罕見的情況下，我確定某事項不應在我的報告中溝通，因為這樣做所造成的負面後果將合理地預期超過該溝通的公共利益，否則我會在我的審計師報告中描述這些事項。
